svg.text: A model behaves strangely in a niche domain because the examples that shaped it did not reflect the real task.
Start with the concrete case: A model behaves strangely in a niche domain because the examples that shaped it did not reflect the real task.
Name the hidden structure: Training diet board linking data quality, coverage, and downstream behavior.
Watch for the trap: Thinking model quality is independent of what the model learned from.
Transfer the habit immediately: Choose one AI task and list what kinds of data would make the model stronger or weaker.

Unlike broad intro courses, this lesson turns data is the diet into a practical operating skill through a real scenario, a visual model, a retrieval gate, and a transfer task built around AI trust calibration, real-world workflows, and verification discipline.
Thinking model quality is independent of what the model learned from.

Choose one AI task and list what kinds of data would make the model stronger or weaker.
The goal is not to memorize the idea, but to build a repeatable habit for AI-assisted work. Ask the learner to produce a concrete artifact, not just an opinion.
